sentences.text: The children sit quietly in the bright classroom.
The teacher writes important notes on the board.
The students open their books after the bell rings.
They listen carefully because the lesson is new.
One boy raises his hand to ask a question.
The teacher smiles before answering clearly.
The class feels confident after understanding the topic.
The girl reads an interesting story during library time.
She sits comfortably near the tall bookshelf.
She turns each page slowly to understand the details.
Her friend whispers softly before sitting beside her.
The story becomes exciting when the hero appears.
She smiles because she enjoys reading.
She finishes the chapter before the class ends.
The boy writes neatly in his notebook during class.
He holds his pencil firmly while thinking carefully.
He reads the question before starting his answer.
He erases mistakes when he notices them.
The teacher walks around to check the work.
He finishes his assignment before the time ends.
He feels proud because he worked hard.
The children run excitedly in the large playground.
Some play football while others jump rope.
The sun shines brightly above the field.
They drink water after running quickly.
A teacher watches carefully from the corner.
They laugh loudly because they enjoy playing.
They return to class when the bell rings.
The teacher helps a student solve a difficult problem.
The student looks confused before asking for help.
The teacher explains the steps slowly and clearly.
The student listens carefully to understand better.
She tries again after receiving guidance.
She smiles because the answer becomes clear.
The teacher feels happy when the student succeeds.
The library is quiet during reading hour.
Rows of books fill the tall shelves.
The boy selects a book about animals.
He sits quietly before opening the first page.
He reads carefully to understand new words.
The librarian smiles gently at the students.
He returns the book after finishing it.
The children draw colorful pictures during art class.
They use crayons and paint to create designs.
One girl draws a house near a river.
Another boy paints a bright blue sky.
The teacher walks around to observe their work.
She praises them because they try their best.
The classroom looks beautiful after the lesson.
The students gather in the school ground for assembly.
They stand in straight lines before the program begins.
They sing the national song with pride.
The principal speaks about discipline and honesty.
The students listen carefully without talking.
They clap politely after the speech ends.
They walk back to class in silence.
The teacher shows a green plant during science class.
She explains how plants grow using sunlight and water.
The students observe the leaves carefully.
One student asks a thoughtful question.
The teacher answers clearly before continuing.
The class writes notes in their notebooks.
They feel curious about learning more.
The school bell rings loudly in the afternoon.
The children pack their bags before leaving.
They walk quickly toward the school gate.
Parents wait patiently outside the building.
The bus driver greets them politely.
The bus moves slowly through busy streets.
The children feel tired but happy after school.
